title: Macros, concurrency, and stabilization
summary: v0.3 integrates eight subplanner tracks (export FFI, native DI, compiler mods, foreign import lib, runtime phase-B GC, corelib tiering, packageKind tool, post-merge CI) from superrepo f57377a through aaddd32 (2026-05-23–25). Delivers mod execution, ExternalLibrary registry, tier-tagged corelib FS/Path, `beskid lsp` with VS Code cli-latest bootstrap, pckg tool packageKind, verify-all-on-main evidence, and docs-ui/nav hardening.
theme: FFI/export, runtime GC, compiler mods, corelib tiering, LSP, stabilization

cutoff.rationale: Starts at v0.2 tip (2026-05-22, f57377a). Eight v0.3 tracks merge on 2026-05-23 (export-ffi, native-di, compiler-mod, foreign-lib, runtime-gc, corelib-tiering, tooling-packageKind). Post-merge CI, trudoc verify, ffi_v03, corelib-quality, and LSP/VS Code bootstrap land 2026-05-24–25 through superrepo HEAD aaddd32.
